rule_name: Windows - Suspicious File Download via Certutil
search_query: index=windows (process_name="certutil.exe" OR Image="*\\certutil.exe") (command_line="*-urlcache*" OR command_line="*-split*") | table _time, Computer, User, process_name, command_line | rename command_line as "Download_Command"
description: Detects the usage of certutil.exe to download files from the internet. Attackers use this built-in Windows tool to bypass security filters and download malicious payloads.
